claim_boundary: This is a label-free quantity-terminology clarification only. It does not evaluate binding, affinity, competition, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, final submission authority, or any Docking result.

v1_byte_bindings.mutation_policy: Both V1 files remain byte-for-byte unchanged. This V1.1 artifact supersedes only the ambiguous quantity wording identified below.

ambiguous_v1_wording.protocol_text: 评估样本不是原始 1,440 条生成序列
ambiguous_v1_wording.problem: The wording collapses raw generator records and the later H1-selected exact-unique pre-QC candidates into one quantity.

raw_generator_record_universe.derivation: 12 parents x 6 patch-by-mode strata per parent x 36 raw RFantibody/ProteinMPNN records per stratum
raw_generator_record_universe.stage: H1 raw generator collection before exact-sequence deduplication and frozen selection

h1_selected_pre_qc_candidate_universe.derivation: 12 parents x 6 patch-by-mode strata per parent x 20 frozen selected candidates per stratum
h1_selected_pre_qc_candidate_universe.stage: after sequence-SHA256 exact deduplication, frozen cross-stratum priority, and frozen per-stratum selection; before Fast-QC and Full-QC
selection_contract: apply the frozen cross-stratum priority and H1 selection hash
select exactly 20 exact-unique candidates per parent-by-patch-by-mode stratum
require 1440 of 1440 globally exact-unique selected sequence hashes

authoritative_quantity_semantics.correct_reading_of_v1_exclusion: The V1 phrase 'raw 1440-candidate pre-QC generation universe' means the 1440 H1-selected exact-unique pre-QC candidate universe. The true raw generator record universe contains 2592 records. Both the 2592 raw-record universe and the 1440 selected pre-QC universe remain outside the formal V4-H estimand until candidates pass the frozen Full-QC and H4 selection contract.

scope.supersedes: Only the two ambiguous V1 quantity phrases listed in ambiguous_v1_wording.
scope.does_not_supersede: Any V1 scientific metric, threshold, endpoint, denominator, estimand, H4 panel rule, prediction-freeze ordering, Docking contract, one-shot rule, or evidence boundary.
scope.future_reporting_requirement: All future V4-H reports must use '2592 raw generator records' and '1440 H1-selected exact-unique pre-QC candidates' as distinct terms.
